title: Mint Imperial Sweets | 2kg Bulk Jar | Traditional Peppermint Flavoured Hard Candy | Vegetarian
features: 🍃 Classic & Refreshing Peppermint Flavour: Savor the crisp, clean taste of authentic peppermint in every hard-boiled sweet. It's a classic flavour that provides a refreshing and invigorating sensation.
🍬 Perfectly Smooth Hard Candy: Enjoy the satisfyingly smooth texture that slowly dissolves in your mouth. Their traditional form and long-lasting nature make them a classic and comforting treat.
✅ Vegetarian Friendly: Crafted with high-quality ingredients, these popular sweets are suitable for a vegetarian diet, making them a great and inclusive choice for many.
📦 Generous 2kg Bulk Jar: This large jar provides a plentiful supply of your favourite sweets, ensuring you are well-stocked for parties, events, sharing with friends, or for resale.
🎉 Ideal for Any Occasion: A simple and classic sweet that is a must-have for every event. They are perfect for freshening your breath or as a fun addition to a pick-and-mix display.
description: Product description Savor the cool, crisp taste of a classic with these Mint Imperial sweets. These traditional panned hard-boiled sweets are a beloved confectionery, each packed with a refreshing and authentic peppermint flavour. Their smooth, satisfying texture and long-lasting taste make them a perfect treat for freshening your breath or simply enjoying a moment of pure sweetness. This generous 2kg bulk jar is an excellent choice for stocking up your home, a fantastic addition to a sweet shop, or a delightful treat for parties and events. The large quantity ensures you have plenty to go around, making them perfect for sharing in any setting. Plus, these delicious mints are vegetarian, making them an inclusive and worry-free treat that everyone can enjoy. Ingredients Sugar, Dextrose, Peppermint Oil
